summary: Tests cover all major requirements (matrix generation, include/exclude, fail-fast, max-parallel, size validation, JSON output), but lack rigor in edge cases and have design issues. The combination-verification assertion creates a variable but never uses it, suggesting incomplete test logic. Missing edge cases: empty dimension arrays, single-item arrays, boundary conditions on defaults, invalid config value types, and validation that output is valid GitHub Actions matrix JSON. Assertions are sometimes loose (e.g., checking dimensions exist without verifying combinations). Limited fixture reuse causes duplication. Would catch major regressions but allow subtle bugs through incomplete assertions.
